examples: At dawn, a villager walked clockwise around a white stupa, set high up over the valley.
At seven in the evening, the gentleman heard a knock at the door, the villager opened the door.
The villager is convinced that those foreign tourists will turn back because that road is being repaired.
For a poor villager in Africa, poaching an elephant for its tusks is easy money.
"Now whenever I score a goal, of course I feel pride, " says the 12-year-old Druze villager.
